name: Bass Enhancer (audio chain v1)
author: KB2UKA
description: Psychoacoustic bass enhancer — fourth of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 blocks per issue #332. MaxxBass / Aphex 204 'Big Bottom' Family-B approach: low-pass isolates the bass band, full-wave rectification generates octave-up harmonics, a high-pass strips the rectified DC + redundant fundamental, mix back over the dry signal. The ear hears the harmonic series and reconstructs the perceived bass fundamental without the radio transmitting frequencies the antenna can't efficiently radiate. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
